steps.t: Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire, can be found at Agal Dûn. You should reach the top of Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire, can be found at Agal Dûn. You should talk to Brathar Crack-helm and Rethvárd at the top of Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire can be found at Agal Dûn. You should talk to Múta, Mézto, Prince Ingór, and Glóin at the top of Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire can be found at Agal Dûn. You should talk to Domongart, Chieftain of the Trév Duvárdain, at the top of Tûr Fúar.
Tûr Fúar, the Drearspire, can be found at Agal Dûn. You should talk to Hraubrek, Chieftain of the Grímklettar, at the top of Tûr Fúar.
